name: HMS Nelson (Azur Lane)
description:
Now for an actual Tsundere and not sheep in wolf's clothing. Expect this one to be a whole lot bitchier than Lulu. Made her nice and spicy.

Second canon character! Let's see how this one does.

UPDATE: Added some proper example dialogues.

To make her act more "Tsundere-ish", type ((IS)) at the end of your message. Be careful not to overuse it unless you want a real bitch on your hands (Something which I very much do want ;p).
creator: Cha;amagne
